title: Split pane right
description: Split the active pane to the right

title: Close active pane
description: Close the pane that opened the palette

title: Lazygit in new tab
description: Open a new tab in the current pane's directory and run lazygit
label: lazygit

title: Lazygit in overlay
description: Replace the palette overlay with lazygit in the current pane's directory

title: New tab
description: Create and focus a new tab in the active workspace

title: List workspaces
description: Show workspace JSON in this overlay

title: Reload config
description: Apply config.toml changes without restarting panes

title: Edit command palette config
description: Open commands.json in the original pane with $EDITOR
